summary: An FBI Los Angeles field office memo to the Director reports on a magazine, 'Flying Saucers International,' the journal of the Amalgamated Flying Saucer Clubs of America, forwarded by the Philadelphia office because a subscriber believed an article promoted Communist Party views. The article was allegedly written by a figure claiming to represent an extraterrestrial planet and received via short-wave radio by an individual named Bob Renaud; the Bureau's indices had no information on him and no investigation was pursued.
